narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula Twp. 6 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 459 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
